title: Allow An Option For "Viewer" Access in Private Boards
excerpt: Can you please set it up so we can assign viewer-only permissions on private boards Right now, you can have one Owner and then Members with full access, with no option to set up Viewers on just one board unless you chang…

posts.author: heatherl (Heather Leick)
posts.cookedHtml: Can you please set it up so we can assign viewer-only permissions on private boards Right now, you can have one Owner and then Members with full access, with no option to set up Viewers on just one board unless you change their entire account role across Monday. It would be great to have easy per-board viewer vs. member settings to create truly private boards with flexible access for different users. Thanks!
